emergency_definition: No heat when outdoor temperature is below 30°F
No AC when outdoor temperature is above 95°F

fallback.action: Inform caller someone will call back within 15 minutes

non_emergency_routing_rules.after_hours: Inform caller of business hours. Offer callback next business day. Collect name and phone number.

call_transfer_rules.voicemail_instruction: Send to voicemail. Office checks voicemail regularly.

integration_constraints: Never create, modify, or access jobs in ServiceTitan — all ServiceTitan tasks are handled by office staff only
after_hours_flow_summary: Greet caller. Confirm purpose. If emergency trigger identified, collect name, phone, address. Attempt transfer to primary on-call (90s timeout), then secondary. If both fail, inform caller of 15-minute callback and alert owner via SMS. If non-emergency, give business hours and collect name/number for next-day callback.
office_hours_flow_summary: Greet caller. Transfer to main office line 720-555-0100. If no answer in 4 rings, send to voicemail.
greeting: Thank you for calling Arctic Comfort HVAC, how can I help you today?
questions_or_unknowns: On-call schedule is rotating weekly — integration for schedule updates not defined
notes: Owner mentioned winter season (Nov–Feb) may add extra on-call techs. Owner will notify Clara team when schedule changes. No automated phone tree / IVR preferred.
